voice_adherence.weakest_moment: "Trước khi em gặp anh," cô nói, giọng nhẹ, "em sợ bóng tối. Sau khi em gặp anh, em vẫn sợ. Nhưng có anh trong bóng tối với em."
voice_adherence.fix: Cut this speech entirely. The voice profile explicitly bans romanticizing loneliness and using direct emotional declaration. Replace with a physical detail — her hand tightening, a glitch in her render, a specific sensory fragment that conveys the same thing without the sentimentality.
voice_adherence.note: The chapter mostly nails the cold, surgical tone. The body-before-emotion principle works well in the co giật sequences and the 36.8°C hằng số callback. But the emotional climax veers into the exact kind of romanticized declaration the voice profile forbids. The line about 'bóng tối' is generic — could appear in any novel. The strongest voice moments are when Cường thinks like a kế toán: counting transactions, finding the exploit. That's specific and true to character.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: "Bằng kỹ năng kế toán của mình, anh tìm ra lỗ hổng trong hệ thống: quá tải các giao dịch dữ liệu." — This beat is executed, but the execution feels too easy. Cường goes from 'trapped and dying' to 'I have a plan' in about two paragraphs of internal monologue.
beat_coverage.fix: Make the discovery harder. Show him failing first — trying commands that don't work, hitting walls, the pain interrupting his thought process. The insight should feel earned through struggle, not gifted by the narrative.
beat_coverage.note: All four outline beats are present: trapped/co giật, Lan's 'buông em ra' speech, the realization about destroying the server, and the accounting exploit. The sacrifice is genuine and the emotional arc tracks. But the accounting solution arrives too smoothly — a man with 93% brain damage shouldn't be able to execute a complex technical plan this cleanly.

character_voice.weakest_moment: "Em không sợ nữa." Cô nói. Giọng tan trong nhiễu. "Em—"
character_voice.fix: Give Lan a final line that's more specific to HER — something that references her unique existence as fragmented consciousness, not a generic brave farewell. Maybe she repeats a detail from earlier that only she would say, or her last word is a question (she's 70% questions in her voice profile).
character_voice.note: Cường's voice is strong when he's in kế toán mode — flat, counting, procedural. The shift to 'Tao/Mày' register under stress is a good character detail. Lan's voice is mostly right: the poetic Northern Vietnamese quality, the glitching, the questions. But her farewell speeches are too composed, too eloquent for someone at 0.3% brain activity who's barely holding a render together. She should sound more fragmented, more desperate, less like she's delivering a screenplay goodbye.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The accounting exploit feels like it appears from nowhere. The outline says 'Gieo mầm: Kỹ năng kế toán của Cường (Hành động)' — but this chapter doesn't seed it, it deploys it. There's no prior setup in the chapter itself showing Cường using his accounting brain in a smaller way that foreshadows this.
plants_seeded.fix: Earlier in the chapter, before the crisis, show Cường instinctively reading the system logs like a spreadsheet — noticing patterns, anomalies, the way an accountant would. Make the reader think 'oh, he's good at this' before the climax requires it.
plants_seeded.note: The 47.3 Hz frequency is a good callback. The vết sẹo on his ribs is well-used. The 'Người Thứ 13' and the 'hàng trăm bóng người' in the system cracks are intriguing seeds for future chapters. But the core plant — the accounting skill as weapon — isn't seeded, it's just activated. The chapter assumes the reader already knows Cường is an accountant rather than showing it organically.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Cô mỉm cười. Nụ cười ấy — anh đã thấy 852 lần. Nhưng lần này nó khác. Không hoàn hảo. Méo một bên. Như người thật.
prose_quality.fix: Cut 'Như người thật.' The previous four words already show it. Adding the comparison flattens the image into explanation. Trust the reader to feel what 'Méo một bên' conveys.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Cô đưa tay lên nhìn. Ngón tay cô trong suốt — anh nhìn thấy khoảng trắng xuyên qua.
prose_quality.note: The prose is strongest when it's most physical and specific: the 41°C port temperature, the taste of blood without a tongue, the transparent fingers. The short declarative sentences in the co giật sequences create genuine rhythm. Weaknesses: some emotional beats are explained rather than evoked ('Như người thật', 'Thật hơn bất cứ thứ gì anh từng chạm'), and there's a recurring pattern of ending sections with a single loaded word on its own line (Trắng. Đau. Nhớ.) that becomes predictable.

continuity.note: Excellent continuity from the previous chapter. The opening picks up exactly where Ch 21 left off — Cường trapped in the white space, 91.3% brain damage, Hemera-Root lockout, Lan at 0.3%. The co giật is a logical consequence of the shock warning from the previous chapter's log. Emotional state tracks: Cường moves from helpless to angry to determined to sacrificial. The 47.3 Hz callback connects to established lore. One minor issue: the previous chapter established Lan at 0.3% brain activity and 'reset,' but this chapter has her forming coherent sentences and even crying. The chapter attempts to explain this (tần số 47.3 Hz, vọng âm), but it's a stretch that a reader might question.

violations: Lan's coherence at 0.3% brain activity strains the established rule that this level is 'không đủ để hình thành suy nghĩ.' The chapter explains it but doesn't fully resolve the contradiction.

The SQL command 'DELETE FROM server.* WHERE status = "ALL"' is a simplification that doesn't match the sophisticated neural architecture established in world.md. A system this complex wouldn't have a single SQL-style kill switch.

Cường's ability to execute complex technical operations at 92-95% brain damage contradicts the established effect of such damage. The canon states that after ~1,200 dives, users lose all recognition of real vs. fake — at 93% damage, he shouldn't be this functional.
canon_compliance.note: No violations of the hard rules (no family mentions, no breaking unbreakable rules). The geography, timeline, and character details are consistent. The main issues are plausibility gaps within the established system rather than direct contradictions.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The 'hàng trăm bóng người' appearing in the system cracks is a striking image but feels like set dressing — it doesn't affect the plot or Cường's decision-making.
lore_integration.fix: Have the bóng người do something — reach toward him, or away, or have one of them be recognizable (a face from Phố Hoa Sữa?). Make their presence mean something for the choice Cường is about to make.
lore_integration.note: The world does real work in this chapter: the ping/latency system, the buffer overflow mechanic, the transaction-based architecture. The accounting-to-hacking pipeline is clever use of established character skills. The weakest integration is the vọng âm / bệnh nhân hôn mê elements — they appear visually but don't impact the action. The strongest is how the physical consequences (co giật, não tổn thương) create genuine stakes that the reader feels in every paragraph.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section where Cường explains his plan to Lan — approximately from 'Mày có biết hệ thống này chạy bao nhiêu giao dịch mỗi giây không?' to 'Xóa hết.' — slows the pacing. It's necessary exposition delivered in a calm conversation while the character is supposedly at 92% brain damage and dying.
engagement.fix: Compress the explanation. Cường shouldn't be able to explain this clearly — he should be executing while deteriorating. Show the plan through action and fragmentary thought, not a coherent lecture. Have him start the overload FIRST, then explain in broken pieces as it's already happening.
engagement.note: The opening is strong — immediate physical crisis, no wasted time. The climax (the DELETE command, Lan's disappearance) is emotionally effective. The ending is haunting. The chapter's main engagement problem is the pacing dip in the middle where the technical plan is explained too thoroughly. A reader turning pages would feel the drag. The surprise element is moderate — the accounting exploit is clever but not shocking. The emotional payoff is genuine, especially 'Anh là người buông tay.'

three_weakest_sentences: Nhưng lần này nó khác. Không hoàn hảo. Méo một bên. Như người thật.
Thật hơn bất cứ thứ gì anh từng chạm trong 852 lần đổ bộ.
Trước khi em gặp anh, em sợ bóng tối. Sau khi em gặp anh, em vẫn sợ. Nhưng có anh trong bóng tối với em.
three_strongest_sentences: Cô đưa tay lên nhìn. Ngón tay cô trong suốt — anh nhìn thấy khoảng trắng xuyên qua.
Anh đưa tay lên cổ, nơi cáp Neural Mantle gắn vào cổng nối. Ngón tay chạm vào kim loại nóng — 41°C. Quá nóng. Bình thường 38.
Cường cảm nhận rõ hàm răng mình cắn vào lưỡi — vị máu — nhưng không có lưỡi. Không có máu. Chỉ có tín hiệu thần kinh báo rằng cơ thể thật đang tự hủy hoại mình.
ai_patterns_detected: Symmetrical emotional structure: Lan's farewell speech is too perfectly composed, hitting exactly the right beats in exactly the right order (acknowledgment → acceptance → request → closure). Real dying people are messier.
The 'single loaded word on its own line' pattern (Trắng. Đau. Nhớ.) appears multiple times with identical effect — becomes a tic rather than a choice.
Emotional explanations appended to images that were already working ('Như người thật', 'Thật hơn bất cứ thứ gì'). The AI habit of not trusting the image to do the work.
The plan explanation scene follows a clean question-answer structure that feels more like a briefing than a desperate conversation between a dying man and a dissolving consciousness.
top_3_revisions: Cut Lan's 'bóng tối' speech entirely and replace with a physical moment — her render glitching in a way that conveys the same sentiment without words. Maybe she reaches for him and her hand passes through, or she tries to say something and the words come out as nhiễu. The voice profile demands body-before-emotion; honor it at the climax.

Restructure the middle section: have Cường begin the buffer overload BEFORE explaining the plan. Show him deteriorating as he works — fragmented thoughts, lost threads, pain interrupting. The reader should feel the cost of every second he spends executing. The calm lecture to Lan undermines the urgency.

Make the accounting discovery harder and more specific. Instead of a sudden insight, show him reading the logs and failing to find a way out, then noticing the transaction count almost by accident — a number his accountant brain can't ignore. The insight should feel like a last resort born from desperation, not a clever solution that appears on demand.
new_canon_entries: Cường's Neural Mantle port reaches 41°C during overload (normal: 38°C)
Buffer overflow at 100% triggers emergency port opening in Hemera's system
Lan's consciousness was definitively deleted in the server wipe
Cường's brain damage reached approximately 95.1% before consciousness loss
Lan's physical body (giường số 4, tầng B3, St. Vincent) continues at 8 nhịp/phút after consciousness deletion
Cường's final action: DELETE command wiping the entire Haymarket server
The 47.3 Hz frequency persists in Cường's consciousness even after Lan's deletion — suggesting it has become part of his neural architecture rather than an external signal
